title: Institutional Executive Brief
description: 30-minute guided walkthrough for executive and procurement stakeholders.

presenterFlow.title: Mission Control
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Establish real-time operational posture and authority controls.

presenterFlow.title: Fleet Control
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Show multi-node visibility and deterministic control coverage.

presenterFlow.title: Recovery Center
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Demonstrate incident recovery and safe restore pathways.

presenterFlow.title: Air-Gapped Operations
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Validate controlled transfer and no-cloud runtime operation.

presenterFlow.title: PKI Trust Fabric
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Prove certificate lifecycle, revocation, and trust traceability.

presenterFlow.title: Procurement Command
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Generate buyer-ready review assets from runtime truth.

presenterFlow.title: Institutional Command
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Close with one-screen readiness posture and executive summary.

title: Operator Training Lab
description: Hands-on training profile with continuity and support drill emphasis.

presenterFlow.title: Training Delivery
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Introduce role-based curriculum and lab tracks.

presenterFlow.title: Support Ops
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Run severity triage and escalation simulation.

presenterFlow.title: Continuity Drills
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Validate remediation tracking from failed drills.

presenterFlow.title: Field Launch
presenterFlow.talkTrack: Confirm pack freshness and launch blockers visibility.
